# Csv Query

## Overview

csv_query — run SELECT-only DuckDB SQL over a stored CSV file.

## Tool

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `csv_query` | Run a SELECT-only DuckDB SQL query over a stored CSV file. | `core:csv_query` | — | — |
